title: Sloanea changii
taxonomy: Sloanea changii is classified under the family Erysaceae, however, I found that it actually belongs to the family Ebenaceae within the order Oxalidales. This classification is part of the larger family of plants known as angiosperms. The family Ebenaceae is a relatively small family of flowering plants primarily found in tropical regions. Further research is needed to confirm the accuracy of this classification. The classification of Sloanea changii may change as new research emerges.
